story.ar: وَقَالَ مُوسَىٰ رَبِّي إِنِّي لِمَا أَنزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
story.transliteration: Wa qala Musa Rabbi inni lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqir
story.en: And Musa (AS) said: 'My Lord, indeed I am in need of whatever good You send down to me.' (Quran 28:24)

incident.ar: عندما فرّ موسى عليه السلام من فرعون، وصل إلى مَدْيَن دون مال أو طعام. وكان يعاني من الجوع والعطش. فدعا ربه قائلاً: رَبِّي إِنِّي لِمَا أَنزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ. فاستجاب الله له وأعطاه بيتاً عند الرجل الصالح، وعملاً رعاية الأغنام، وزوجة من أسرة صالحة.
incident.transliteration: Indama farra Musa alayhi as-salam min Fir'awn, wasala ila Madyan dun mal aw ta'am. Wa kana ya'ani min al-ju' wa al-'atash. Fada'a rabbahu qa'ilan: Rabbi inni lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqir. Fastajaba Allah lahu wa a'tahu baytan inda ar-rajul as-salih, wa 'amalan ri'ayata al-aghnam, wa zawjatan min usratin salihah.
incident.en: When Musa (AS) fled from Pharaoh, he reached Madyan without money or food. He was suffering from hunger and thirst. So he called upon his Lord, saying: 'My Lord, indeed I am in need of whatever good You send down to me.' Allah answered his prayer and gave him a home with a righteous man, work as a shepherd, and a wife from a righteous family.

outcome.ar: استجاب الله تعالى لدعاء موسى عليه السلام وأعطاه السكن والعمل والزواج، مما يظهر أن الله يستجيب لدعاء المحتاجين الصادقين.
outcome.transliteration: Astajaba Allah ta'ala li-du'a Musa alayhi as-salam wa a'tahu as-sakan wa al-'amal wa az-zawaj, mimma yuzhir anna Allah yastajibu li-du'a al-muhtajin as-sadiqin.
outcome.en: Allah answered the dua of Musa (AS) and gave him shelter, work, and marriage, showing that Allah responds to the sincere dua of those in need.

story.ar: وَأَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
story.transliteration: Wa Ayyuba idh nada rabbahu anni massaniya ad-durru wa anta arhamu ar-rahimin
story.en: And [mention] Ayyub (AS), when he called to his Lord: 'Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful.' (Quran 21:83)

incident.ar: أصيب أيوب عليه السلام بمرض شديد استمر لسنوات عديدة، وفقد صحته وماله وعائلته. لكنه صبر وداوم على الدعاء والذكر، قائلاً: إني مسني الضر وأنت أرحم الراحمين. فاستجاب الله له وأعاده إلى حالته الأولى بل أفضل.
incident.transliteration: Usiba Ayyub alayhi as-salam bi-maradin shadid istamarra li-sanawatin 'adidah, wa faqada sihhatahu wa malahu wa 'a'ilatahu. Lakinahu sabara wa dawama 'ala ad-du'a wa adh-dhikr, qa'ilan: Inni massaniya ad-durru wa anta arhamu ar-rahimin. Fastajaba Allah lahu wa a'ada ila halatihi al-ula bal afdal.
incident.en: Ayyub (AS) was afflicted with a severe illness that lasted for many years, and he lost his health, wealth, and family. But he remained patient and continued to make dua and dhikr, saying: 'Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful.' Allah answered his prayer and restored him to his former state, even better.

outcome.ar: بصبر أيوب عليه السلام ودعائه المستمر، شفاه الله تعالى وأعاد له كل ما فقده، وهذا درس في الصبر والثقة في رحمة الله.
outcome.transliteration: Bi-sabr Ayyub alayhi as-salam wa du'ihi al-mustamirr, shafahu Allah ta'ala wa a'ada lahu kulla ma faqadahu, wa hadha darsun fi as-sabr wa ath-thiqa fi rahmati Allah.
outcome.en: Through the patience and continuous dua of Ayyub (AS), Allah healed him and restored everything he had lost, which is a lesson in patience and trust in Allah's mercy.

story.ar: قَالَ إِنِّي أُرِيدُ أَنْ أُنكِحَكَ إِحْدَى ابْنَتَيَّ هَاتَيْنِ
story.transliteration: Qala inni uridu an unkihaka ihda ibnatai hataiyn
story.en: He said: 'Indeed, I wish to wed you one of these two daughters of mine.' (Quran 28:27)

incident.ar: بعد أن دعا موسى عليه السلام ربه للرزق، أعطاه الله عملاً عند رجل صالح في مَدْيَن. بسبب أمانة موسى وقوته، عرض عليه الرجل الصالح الزواج من إحدى ابنتيه. وهكذا تحققت نعمة الزواج بعد الدعاء والصبر.
incident.transliteration: Ba'da an da'a Musa alayhi as-salam rabbahu li-rizq, a'tahu Allah 'amalan inda rajulin salihin fi Madyan. Bi-sabab amanati Musa wa quwatihi, 'arada 'alayhi ar-rajul as-salih az-zawaj min ihda ibnataihi. Wa hakadha tahaqqaqat ni'matu az-zawaj ba'da ad-du'a wa as-sabr.
incident.en: After Musa (AS) called upon his Lord for provision, Allah gave him work with a righteous man in Madyan. Due to Musa's trustworthiness and strength, the righteous man offered him marriage to one of his daughters. Thus, the blessing of marriage was realized after dua and patience.

outcome.ar: بعد دعاء موسى للرزق، منحه الله الزواج أيضاً، مما يظهر أن الله يعطي من فضله عند الصبر والدعاء.
outcome.transliteration: Ba'da du'a Musa li-rizq, manahahu Allah az-zawaj ay'dan, mimma yuzhir anna Allah yu'ti min fadlihi inda as-sabr wa ad-du'a.
outcome.en: After Musa's dua for provision, Allah also granted him marriage, showing that Allah gives from His bounty when one is patient and makes dua.

story.ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ مَكَّنَّا لِيُوسُفَ فِي الْأَرْضِ يَتَبَوَّأُ مِنْهَا حَيْثُ يَشَاءُ
story.transliteration: Wa kathalika makkanna li-Yusufa fi al-ardi yatawawa'u minha haythu yasha'u
story.en: And thus We established Yusuf (AS) in the land to settle therein wherever he willed. (Quran 12:56)

incident.ar: عانى يوسف عليه السلام من السجن لسنوات، لكنه استمر في الدعاء والثقة في الله. عندما فسر حلم الملك، منحه الله العلم والحكمة وأصبح من أقرب المستشارين للملك، وتمكن من منصب عالي بسبب علمه الذي منحه الله له.
incident.transliteration: A'ana Yusuf alayhi as-salam min as-sijn li-sanawat, lakinahu istamarra fi ad-du'a wa ath-thiqa fi Allah. Indama fassara hulm al-malik, manahahu Allah al-'ilm wa al-hikmah wa asbaha min aqrab al-mustasharin li-al-malik, wa tumukin min mansabin 'alin bi-sabab 'ilmihi alladhi manahahu Allah lahu.
incident.en: Yusuf (AS) suffered in prison for years, but he continued in dua and trust in Allah. When he interpreted the king's dream, Allah granted him knowledge and wisdom, and he became one of the closest advisors to the king, attaining a high position due to the knowledge Allah had granted him.

outcome.ar: بصبر يوسف عليه السلام وثباته، منحه الله العلم والحكمة التي أدت إلى نجاحه وارتقائه، مما يظهر أن الله يكافئ الصبر والثقة.
outcome.transliteration: Bi-sabr Yusuf alayhi as-salam wa thabatihi, manahahu Allah al-'ilm wa al-hikmah allati adat ila najahihi wa irtiqa'ihi, mimma yuzhir anna Allah yukafi'u as-sabr wa ath-thiqa.
outcome.en: Through the patience and steadfastness of Yusuf (AS), Allah granted him knowledge and wisdom that led to his success and elevation, showing that Allah rewards patience and trust.

story.ar: أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ. وَوَضَعْنَا عَنكَ وِزْرَكَ
story.transliteration: Alam nashrah laka sadrak. Wa wada'na 'anka wizrak
story.en: Did We not expand for you your breast? And We removed from you your burden. (Quran 94:1-2)

incident.ar: عندما كان النبي محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم يواجه صعوبات وهموماً في دعوته، نزلت عليه سورة الشرح التي تطمئنه وتذكره بأن الله سيفرج همه ويشرح صدره. وكان يدعو دائماً: اللهم اشرح لي صدري ويسر لي أمري.
incident.transliteration: Indama kana an-Nabi Muhammad salla Allahu alayhi wa sallam yuwajihu su'ubat wa humum fi da'watihi, nazalat 'alayhi surat ash-Sharh allati tumma'innuhu wa tadhkuruhu bi-anna Allah sa-yufarrij hummahu wa yashrah sadrahu. Wa kana yad'u da'iman: Allahumma ishrah li sadri wa yassir li amri.
incident.en: When Prophet Muhammad (SAW) faced difficulties and worries in his mission, Surah Ash-Sharh was revealed to him, comforting him and reminding him that Allah would relieve his worries and expand his chest. He would always make dua: 'O Allah, expand my chest for me and make my task easy for me.'

outcome.ar: بفضل الدعاء والثقة في الله، فتح الله صدر النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم وسهل له أموره، مما يظهر أن الله يزيل الهم والضيق عن عباده المخلصين.
outcome.transliteration: Bi-fadli ad-du'a wa ath-thiqa fi Allah, fataha Allah sadra an-Nabi salla Allahu alayhi wa sallam wa sahhal lahu umurahu, mimma yuzhir anna Allah yuzilu al-hamm wa ad-dayq 'an 'ibadihi al-mukhlisin.
outcome.en: Through dua and trust in Allah, Allah expanded the chest of the Prophet (SAW) and made his affairs easy, showing that Allah removes worry and distress from His sincere servants.

story.ar: قَالَا رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
story.transliteration: Qala rabbana zalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakunanna min al-khasirin
story.en: They said: 'Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.' (Quran 7:23)

incident.ar: عندما أخطأ آدم وحواء عليهما السلام وأكلا من الشجرة المحرمة، ناديا ربهما قائلين: ربنا ظلمنا أنفسنا وإن لم تغفر لنا وترحمنا لنكونن من الخاسرين. فاستجاب الله لدعائهما وتاب عليهما وغفر لهما.
incident.transliteration: Indama akhta'a Adam wa Hawwa' alayhima as-salam wa akala min ash-shajarati al-muharramah, nadaya rabbahuma qa'ilayn: Rabbana zalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakunanna min al-khasirin. Fastajaba Allah li-du'ayhima wa taba 'alayhima wa ghafara lahuma.
incident.en: When Adam and Hawwa (AS) made a mistake and ate from the forbidden tree, they called upon their Lord, saying: 'Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.' Allah answered their dua, accepted their repentance, and forgave them.

outcome.ar: بسبب توبة آدم وحواء عليهما السلام ودعائهما الصادق، قبل الله توبتهما وغفر لهما، مما يظهر أن الله يقبل توبة التائبين.
outcome.transliteration: Bi-sabab tawbati Adam wa Hawwa' alayhima as-salam wa du'ayhima as-sadiq, qabala Allah tawbatahuma wa ghafara lahuma, mimma yuzhir anna Allah yaqbulu tawbata at-ta'ibin.
outcome.en: Due to the repentance and sincere dua of Adam and Hawwa (AS), Allah accepted their repentance and forgave them, showing that Allah accepts the repentance of those who repent.

story.ar: رَّبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
story.transliteration: Rabbi hab li hukman wa alhiqni bi-as-salihin
story.en: My Lord, grant me wisdom and join me with the righteous. (Quran 26:83)

incident.ar: كان إبراهيم عليه السلام يبحث عن الحق في مجتمع يعبد الأصنام. دعا ربه أن يهديه ويمنحه الحكمة. فاستجاب الله لدعائه وهداه إلى الإسلام وأصبح من خليل الله وأبو الأنبياء.
incident.transliteration: Kana Ibrahim alayhi as-salam yabhathu 'an al-haqq fi mujtama'in ya'budu al-asnam. Da'a rabbahu an yahdiyahu wa yamnuhahu al-hikmah. Fastajaba Allah li-du'ihi wa hadahu ila al-Islam wa asbaha min khalil Allah wa abu al-anbiya'.
incident.en: Ibrahim (AS) was searching for truth in a society that worshiped idols. He called upon his Lord to guide him and grant him wisdom. Allah answered his dua, guided him to Islam, and he became the friend of Allah and father of the prophets.

outcome.ar: بفضل دعاء إبراهيم عليه السلام للهداية، منحه الله الحكمة والهدى وأصبح من أولي العزم من الرسل.
outcome.transliteration: Bi-fadli du'a Ibrahim alayhi as-salam li-al-hidayah, manahahu Allah al-hikmah wa al-huda wa asbaha min uli al-'azm min ar-rusul.
outcome.en: Through Ibrahim's dua for guidance, Allah granted him wisdom and guidance, and he became one of the resolute messengers.

story.en: My Lord, support me because they have denied me. (Quran 23:26)

incident.ar: عندما استمر قوم نوح عليه السلام في تكذيبه والاستهزاء به لسنوات طويلة، دعا نوح ربه أن ينصره. فاستجاب الله له وأمره ببناء السفينة لحمايته والمؤمنين من الطوفان العظيم.
incident.transliteration: Indama istamarra qawmu Nuh alayhi as-salam fi takdhibihi wa al-istihza' bihi li-sanawatin tawilah, da'a Nuh rabbahu an yansurahu. Fastajaba Allah lahu wa amarahu bi-bina'i as-safinati li-himayati wa al-mu'minin min at-tufan al-'azim.
incident.en: When the people of Nuh (AS) continued to reject him and mock him for many years, Nuh called upon his Lord to support him. Allah answered his dua and commanded him to build the ark to protect him and the believers from the great flood.

outcome.ar: بفضل دعاء نوح عليه السلام، حمى الله المؤمنين في السفينة بينما أهلك الكافرين، مما يظهر أن الله يحمي عباده المؤمنين.
outcome.transliteration: Bi-fadli du'a Nuh alayhi as-salam, hama Allah al-mu'minin fi as-safinah baynama ahlaka al-kafirin, mimma yuzhir anna Allah yahmi 'ibadahu al-mu'minin.
outcome.en: Through the dua of Nuh (AS), Allah protected the believers in the ark while destroying the disbelievers, showing that Allah protects His believing servants.
